code:
class ChainedProcessor:
    def __init__(self, initial_value=""):
        self.value = str(initial_value)

    def append(self, text):
        self.value += str(text)
        return self

    def prepend(self, text):
        self.value = str(text) + self.value
        return self

    def to_upper(self):
        self.value = self.value.upper()
        return self

    def to_lower(self):
        self.value = self.value.lower()
        return self

    def replace(self, old, new):
        self.value = self.value.replace(old, new)
        return self

    def strip(self):
        self.value = self.value.strip()
        return self

    def get_result(self):
        return self.value

if __name__ == '__main__':
    result = ChainedProcessor("  Hello World  ") \
        .strip() \
        .replace("World", "Python") \
        .append("!") \
        .to_upper() \
        .prepend(">>> ") \
        .get_result()

    print(result)

    another_result = ChainedProcessor(123) \
        .append(456) \
        .prepend("Number: ") \
        .get_result()

    print(another_result)
